prompt_text: Suggest a meal plan for someone with a gluten allergy.
response_text:
# Gluten-Free Meal Plan

## Breakfast Options
- Eggs (scrambled, omelet, or fried) with vegetables
- Oatmeal (certified gluten-free) with fruit and nuts
- Greek yogurt with berries and granola (gluten-free)
- Smoothie bowls with fruit and coconut
- Gluten-free toast with avocado or nut butter

## Lunch Ideas
- Grilled chicken with roasted vegetables and rice
- Salad with protein (tuna, chickpeas, or grilled tofu)
- Rice bowls with beans, vegetables, and avocado
- Lettuce wraps with ground turkey and vegetables
- Corn tortilla tacos with beans and salsa

## Dinner Suggestions
- Baked salmon with sweet potato and broccoli
- Ground beef with zucchini noodles and marinara
- Grilled steak with quinoa and asparagus
- Chicken stir-fry with rice
- Pork chops with mashed potatoes and green beans

## Snacks
- Fresh fruit and nuts
- Cheese and crackers (gluten-free)
- Hummus with vegetables
- Hard-boiled eggs
- Popcorn

## Key Tips
- Read labels carefully (many processed foods contain hidden gluten)
- Use naturally gluten-free grains: rice, quinoa, corn, potatoes
- Avoid wheat, barley, rye, and regular oats
- Cross-contamination matters—use separate kitchen tools if needed

Would you like specific recipes or a shopping list?
